messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0148",
  "title": "POINT AWARDS",
  "page_index": 45,
  "page_range": "45"
}

Section text:
## POINT AWARDS

message.content: This section contains only the heading "POINT AWARDS" and no substantive text. It can only answer basic structural or navigational questions about the document's organization, specifically confirming the presence of a section dedicated to point awards. It does not provide information to answer questions regarding definitions, procedures, dates, entities, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
